SBLLM_SignalScope_wave_residue_training.principle: The wave is the training material. Residue is the learned structure. Weights are not required.

training_mode.name: wave_residue_imprinting
training_mode.description: Repeated wave inputs are converted into signature traces and written into residue memory when admissible.

does_not_store: raw wave as opaque blob only

learning_rule.if_trace_enters_instability: store as warning residue or reject persistence

future_effect.meaning: The system learns by changing what continuations become easier or harder.

SBLLM_SignalScope_wave_residue_training.agent_instruction: Implement wave-residue training as residue imprinting. Do not add weight matrices, gradient descent, or neural training loops unless explicitly requested.
